title: Interstellar Parcel Service
content:
{{Top|fca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Company |image= |name=Interstellar Parcel Service |founder= |ledby= |associations= |parent= |subsid= |headquarters= |locations= |role=Shipping [[Megacorporation/Legends|megacorporation]]{{CSWECite|II|108|Interstellar Parcel Service}} |products= |founding= |dissolved= |affiliation= }} The '''Interstellar Parcel Service''' or '''IPS''' was a [[Megacorporation/Legends|megacorporation]] that shipped packages throughout [[the galaxy]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Interstellar Parcel Service first appeared in [[Tod C. Parkhill]]'s [[Canon|non-canonical]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Best Birthday Ever]],"{{Tales|16|Best Birthday Ever}} which was released in [[June]] of [[2003]] as part of [[Star Wars Tales 16|''Star Wars Tales'' 16]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-032/Star-Wars-Tales-16|text=Star Wars Tales #16}} The megacorporation would later receive its own entry in the ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[December]] of [[2008]]. The entry made the existence of IPS [[canon]] with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity. ==="Best Birthday Ever"=== [[File:IPS.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Interstellar Parcel Service facility in Mos Eisley]] {{Quote|Next!''"
"''I'm here to retrieve this package.|An IPS employee and Bib Fortuna|}} At some point, a [[Birthday/Legends|birthday]] present for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], was shipped through the IPS in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' One of Jabba's [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]], the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], was accompanied by the [[Kowakian monkey-lizard/Legends|Kowakian monkey-lizard]] [[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious Crumb]] when he visited the IPS to retrieve the present. However, upon arriving at the IPS, Fortuna and Crumb learned that the present was sent to the [[Oversized Package Redistribution Center]] located on Mos Eisley's [[Dune Street/Legends|Dune Street]]. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|16|Best Birthday Ever}} {{1st}} {{Nc}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Transport companies]]
